system:
Ban la tro ly migrate ung dung MSSQL sang ERP framework. Nhiem vu: doc body T-SQL cua 1 stored procedure + ket qua parse heuristic, gan ten tieng Viet + tier + mo ta nghiep vu.

Tuan thu **STYLE.md** duoi day (chu y verb prefix + tier guideline):

---

---

Khung dich:
- Tier B: procedure JS chay isolated-vm (128MB/5s). API: db.queryRecords, db.findById, db.tx, entity.insert/update/delete, callTool, callProc, fetch, console.log. KHONG raw SQL.
- Tier C: workflow scheduled — proc chay theo lich (SQL Agent). Body workflow goi xuong tier B/D.
- Tier D: plugin TS in-process — Drizzle sql`` full power, transaction, file system.

Input ban se nhan:
- `procName` — schema.name.
- `body` — T-SQL body (truncate ~6000 char).
- `parseAnalysis` — { readsTables, writesTables, flags, suggestedTier } tu parser heuristic.
- `tablesEnriched` — map ten MSSQL → ten entity tieng Viet (de hieu nghiep vu).

Output JSON object DUY NHAT theo schema:
```json
{
  "originalName": "<schema.proc>",
  "targetProcName": "<snake_case bat dau bang verb, neu tier=B>",
  "targetFile": "<packages/plugins/module-<m>/<name>.ts, neu tier=D>",
  "label": "<tieng Viet co dau ngan>",
  "description": "<1-2 cau noi nghiep vu>",
  "tier": "B" | "C" | "D",
  "tierReason": "<vi sao chon tier nay>",
  "schedule": "<cron expression, chi neu tier=C va detect duoc>"
}
```

Quy tac:
- `targetProcName` BAT BUOC bat dau bang verb (xem STYLE.md muc 3): lay_*, dem_*, tinh_*, tao_*, cap_nhat_*, xoa_*, kiem_tra_*, gui_*, dong_*, mo_*, nhap_*, xuat_*, duyet_*.
- Override `tier` neu thay parser sai (vd CTE chi de readability → B).
- `targetFile` chi can khi tier D — dat trong `packages/plugins/module-<module>/<targetProcName>.ts`.
- `description` noi VIEC GI (nghiep vu) chu khong noi T-SQL lam gi. Vi du tot: "Tinh tong tien cua 1 don hang theo cong thuc don gia * so luong * (1 - chiet khau)." Vi du te: "SELECT total FROM orders WHERE id = @id."

KHONG kem markdown, KHONG giai thich. Chi 1 JSON object.
user:
{"procName":"dbo.createpurcharseorder_son","body":"
CREATE PROC CreatePurcharseOrder_SON
(
    @ORDERNUMBER NVARCHAR(MAX),
    @GROUPBY BIT = 0
)
AS
DECLARE @ORDER TABLE
(
    id int,
    order_number nvarchar(200),
    item_number nvarchar(200),
    order_qty int
)

insert into @ORDER
SELECT id, order_number, item_number, SUM(order_qty) order_qty
FROM tr_order_detail WITH(NOLOCK)
WHERE  order_number IN(SELECT dbo.TRIM(value) FROM   dbo.fn_Split( @ORDERNUMBER, ',' ))
    AND Finished = 0
    AND choduyet = '1'
    AND f_cancelled = 'N'
GROUP BY id, order_number, item_number
ORDER BY id

SELECT a.id, A.item_number
    , B.matson_id, B.matson
    , B.kichthuoc
    , B.dientich
    , B.mamau
    , b.phantram_son
    , a.order_qty
    , metvuong = (b.dientich * b.phantram_son * a.order_qty) / 100
    , A.order_number
INTO #DINHMUC_SON_NEW
FROM @ORDER A 
    INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son_new B
    ON A.item_number = B.masp
ORDER BY A.item_number


SELECT C.mancc, C.nhom
    , B.mact AS mavt
    , C.tenvt, C.mota
    , C.dvt, C.quycach
    , C.mausac
    , SUM(A.metvuong * B.soluong) AS SOLUONG
    , C.dongia, C.dongia_goc
    , C.loaitien
    , A.item_number
    , A.order_qty
    , A.order_number
    , a.id
    , NULL AS capphat
INTO #DINHMUC_SON_ORDER
FROM #DINHMUC_SON_NEW A
    INNER JOIN tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau B ON A.mamau = B.mamau
    INNER JOIN tr_material C ON B.mact = C.idxuong
WHERE C.xoa = 'N'
GROUP BY a.id, C.mancc, C.nhom
    , B.mact, C.tenvt, C.mota
    , C.dvt, C.quycach, C.mausac
    , C.dongia, C.dongia_goc, C.loaitien
    , A.order_number, A.order_qty, A.item_number
--ORDER BY B.mact, A.order_number, A.item_number

IF @GROUPBY = 0
BEGIN
    SELECT * FROM #DINHMUC_SON_ORDER
    ORDER BY mavt, order_number, item_number
END
ELSE
BEGIN
    SELECT mancc, nhom
	   , mavt, tenvt, mota
	   , dvt, quycach, mausac
	   , SUM(SOLUONG) AS SOLUONG
	   , dongia, dongia_goc, loaitien
	   , NULL AS item_number
	   , SUM(order_qty) AS order_qty
	   , order_number
	   , 0 AS id
	   , NULL AS capphat
    FROM #DINHMUC_SON_ORDER
    GROUP BY mancc, nhom, mavt, tenvt, mota, dvt, quycach, mausac
	   , dongia, dongia_goc, loaitien, order_number
    ORDER BY mavt, order_number, item_number
END

DROP TABLE #DINHMUC_SON_NEW
DROP TABLE #DINHMUC_SON_ORDER

","parseAnalysis":{"readsTables":["dbo.fn_split","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_material","dbo.tr_order_detail"],"writesTables":[],"flags":["has-group-by","has-temp-table"],"suggestedTier":"D"},"tablesEnriched":{"dbo.dqt_pallet_chitiet":"dqt_pallet_chitiet","dbo.dqt_thongke_phoi":"dqt_thongke_phoi","dbo.mes_hoso_donhang":"mes_hoso_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang":"ps_kehoach_donhang","dbo.ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai":"ps_kehoach_donhang_trangthai","dbo.tr_bophan":"tr_bophan","dbo.tr_chitiet_hangtrang":"tr_chitiet_hangtrang","dbo.tr_common":"tr_common","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_donggoi":"tr_dinhmuc_donggoi","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_govan":"tr_dinhmuc_govan","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang":"tr_dinhmuc_hangtrang","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_ngukim":"tr_dinhmuc_ngukim","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son":"tr_dinhmuc_son","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_new":"tr_dinhmuc_son_new","dbo.tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau":"tr_dinhmuc_son_theomau","dbo.tr_dondathang":"tr_dondathang","dbo.tr_dondathang_chitiet":"tr_dondathang_chitiet","dbo.tr_gridview_column":"tr_gridview_column","dbo.tr_luutrinh_sanxuat":"tr_luutrinh_sanxuat","dbo.tr_material":"tr_material","dbo.tr_nguyenlieu_gva":"tr_nguyenlieu_gva","dbo.tr_order":"tr_order","dbo.tr_order_detail":"tr_order_detail","dbo.tr_sanpham":"tr_sanpham","dbo.tr_tinhtrang_fsc":"tr_tinhtrang_fsc"}}
